query: Microsoft Build 2026 Scout Autopilot Copilot features announcement date

mako.raw:
{"query":"Microsoft Build 2026 Scout Autopilot Copilot features announcement date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1845,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://news.microsoft.com/build-2026/","title":"Microsoft Build 2026","content":"Microsoft Chairman and CEO Satya Nadella presents the next-generation quantum chip Majorana 2 at Microsoft Build 2026 in San Francisco.
Microsoft AI Microsoft Security Dynamics 365 Microsoft 365 Microsoft Power Platform Microsoft Teams Microsoft 365 Copilot Small Business Azure Microsoft Developer Microsoft Learn Support for AI marketplace apps Microsoft Tech Community Microsoft Marketplace Software companies Visual Studio Careers About Microsoft Company news Privacy at Microsoft Investors Diversity and inclusion Accessibility Sustainability"},{"url":"https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/06/02/introducing-microsoft-scout-your-always-on-personal-agent/","title":"Introducing Microsoft Scout: Your always-on personal agent | Microsoft 365 Blog","content":"We are also introducing Microsoft Scout, our first Autopilot agent.
Microsoft Scout is integrated across the Microsoft 365 apps you use every day, keeping it grounded in your flow of work.
With Microsoft Scout, agents can only reach the resources and destinations you’ve approved.
Microsoft Scout is available as an experimental release through Frontier, giving customers a chance to explore how Microsoft Scout can fit into their own workflows."},{"url":"https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/06/02/microsoft-build-2026-be-yourself-at-work/","title":"Microsoft Build 2026: Be yourself at work - The Official Microsoft Blog","content":"And as always, it starts with the developer.
Work IQ is the workplace intelligence layer for agents, capturing how work actually happens across Microsoft 365, organizational systems and external sources: people, emails, documents, meetings and how they connect.
There are other new members of the MAI family too: MAI Transcribe 1.5 combines state-of-the-art accuracy across 43 languages, with streaming coming soon.
MAI-Voice-2 and its flash variant are now available in more than 15 additional languages with new voice options.
Windows Services for Linux (WSL) 2 with native GPU passthrough and full CUDA support comes pre-configured for developers, with Visual Studio Code, GitHub Copilot and many more of your favorite tools pre-installed.
Based on 1 Theoretical FP4 TOPS using the sparsity feature.
Surface Pro Surface Laptop Surface Laptop Ultra Surface RTX Spark Dev Box Copilot for organizations Copilot for personal use Explore Microsoft products Windows 11 apps Account profile Download Center Microsoft Store support Returns Order tracking Certified Refurbished Microsoft Store Promise Flexible Payments Microsoft in education Devices for education Microsoft Teams for Education Microsoft 365 Education How to buy for your school Educator training and development Deals for students and parents AI for education"},{"url":"https://cloudwell.io/microsoft-build-2026-announcements/","title":"What Microsoft Build 2026 Announcements Mean for You and Your Team - Cloudwell","content":"We’ve spent the last year getting comfortable with delegating tasks to AI in a chat window, and more recently handing off bigger jobs through Cowork.
An Autopilot is always on.
Scout works where you work.
It joins group chats in Teams, handles threads in Outlook, and reaches across OneDrive and your wider Work IQ context.
What’s new is that developers can now build agents that tap directly into that context layer, including agents built outside Microsoft 365 Copilot."}]}

About This Video:
Following the Microsoft Build keynote, this video breaks down essential AI news for the Copilot ecosystem. We introduce WebIQ, a new method for web grounding, replacing the previous reliance on microsoft bing search. Discover how these grounding techniques impact your use of Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI agents.

The rest — **Copilot editing your Word document by default**, a new **FLUX.2** image model in PowerPoint, the **Work IQ APIs** reaching GA, and a wave of **admin, governance and agent** updates — is below, each in plain English with what it actually means for you. **The big headlines:** Microsoft Scout · Cowork is GA · Claude in Copilot · Federated Connectors GA · Word edits by default. If a Copilot waits for you to ask, an *Autopilot* is **always on** — it works in the background, on a schedule you set, under its **own identity**, and acts on your behalf.","score":0.8252664,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.strategy365.co.uk/microsoft-build-2026-roundup","title":"Microsoft Build 2026: Key AI announcements for SMEs","content":"# Microsoft Build 2026: from Copilot to Autopilot. Microsoft Build 2026 showed us how AI has evolved from answering questions, to doing the work, to keeping the work moving. Now, AI will be able to take ownership of work, monitor what’s happening, and act on our behalf, often without needing a prompt each time. ### What is Microsoft Scout? Microsoft Scout is an autonomous agent that works in the background and sticks with a problem until it finds a viable route to completion of the task. Rather than being a background feature, Work IQ is now the **context layer that powers how agents understand your work as it’s happening,** not just what files you have, but who you’re working with, what you’re involved in, and how things are progressing over time. Work IQ gives the agent an understanding of your business, Web IQ connects that to what’s happening in the wider world, and both are designed to work in real time as part of an ongoing workflow, not just a single search and response.","score":0.7208996,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X5IvkUxfqms","title":"Microsoft Build 2026 - Top Announcements","content":"I've cut through the 100+ announcements.
